## Problem

What user problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the improvement you want to see.

## User Flow

Explain how the ideal flow should feel for a beginner user.

## Additional Context

Share screenshots, references, or related SSH onboarding constraints if helpful.
